name: QNI : Confidential Content Being Transferred to Foreign Geography
notes:
This rule detects confidential content that is being transferred to countries/regions with restricted access.

Note that these countries/regions are defined in the Building Block: "BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access" therefore ensure this is setup according to your business use case before you enable this rule.
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access
when any of Suspect Content Descriptions (QNI) match confidential content
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Confidential Content Being Transferred to Foreign Geography on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions (QNI) match confidential content
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Confidential Content Being Transferred to Foreign Geography
Event description: Detects when confidential content is transferred to Countries/Regions with Restricted Access.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
